# LegalHai

> Legal understanding platform for India — explain any contract before you sign.

LegalHai (https://legalhai.in) helps people understand rental agreements, employment contracts, NDAs, and legal documents using AI. Users upload a PDF and receive plain-language summaries, risky clause highlights, and explanations in Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, and 12+ Indian languages.

## Product

- Free trial: 2 document analyses
- Pro: ₹49/month unlimited analyses
- Launch promo: LAUNCH100 (100% off)
- Not a law firm — for understanding agreements, not legal advice

## Key pages

- Home: https://legalhai.in/
- Pricing: https://legalhai.in/pricing
- Sign up: https://legalhai.in/sign-up

## Contact

https://legalhai.in
